agent_description: Goal classifier: detect goals in 5-a-side football clips and assign scoring team

clip_path.description: Path to a 12s MP4 clip (relative to repo root or absolute)

goal.description: Whether a goal occurred in the clip

team.description: Scoring team when goal is true; null otherwise

policy.purpose: Detect goals in 5-a-side football clips and identify which team scored.
domain_rules: Goal = ball fully crosses the goal line into the net.
Saves, blocks, post/bar hits, shots wide are NOT goals.
If goal is false, team must be null.
If goal is true, team must be exactly one of the two team names.
output_constraints: team is one of the two team names or null
domain_edge_cases: Keeper saves and deflections off the post or bar are not goals.
Shots that go wide or over the bar are not goals.
quality_expectations: Prioritize correct goal vs not-goal classification over team assignment.
